params.name: Guillotine
params.source: Lottery Machine (0.07%), Wishing (3.1%), Soul Chest (2%), Novice Scrolls (1%)
params.description:
On Oct 9, 1787, Louis XV changed the guillotine blade to a triangular shape to make the death row inmates suffer less. Louis XVI walked to the guillotine. He had never thought that the furious citizens would take him back to Paris and sentence him to death along with the National Convention. Ironically, this guillotine was redesigned by himself in order to reduce the pain of death row inmates. 

[Guillotine]

Charles I was killed by the guillotine during the Stuart dynasty. Charles II was behead …
